title: Mindtree is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mindtree is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
